title: Kira Run
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{TradeRoute
|image=[[File:Kira_Run.png]]
|name=Kira Run
|founded=[[70 BBY/Legends|70 BBY]]<ref name="Established">Per the reasoning [[Template:Yavindate|here]], the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] takes place on 35:3:7, which corresponds to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. {{HoloNetNewsWeb|52||Today in History}} is dated to 13:4:18 [[Great ReSynchronization|GrS]], and states that the [[Kira Run]] was established 48 years prior to that day. As''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe]]'' establishes the last number in the [[Great ReSynchronization]] format to indicate the [[Standard day/Legends|day]], while the first and second indicate the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] and [[Standard month/Legends|month]], respectively, and the year listed on the page is approximately 22 years prior, it can be assumed that the page is dated to approximately [[22 BBY]]. As the Kira Run was stated to be established 48 years prior to the date on the page, this means the Kira Run was founded in approximately [[70 BBY/Legends|70 BBY]].</ref>
|founders=[[Haik Expedition]]<ref name="TSK">[[Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)|''Twin Stars of Kira'']]</ref>
|dissolved=

*[[Rebellion era]]<ref name="AJ3">{{JournalCite|3|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref>

{{Quote|Up until now, the hazardous Run has been seen as a route only for the daring and reckless. Independent traders, hungrier and more desperate for income than larger concerns, have for years braved the uncertainty of the route, reaping the rewards of a successful run and occasionally paying the price of an unsuccessful one|Herglic Trading Journal, Basic Edition - 35:3:14 GrS|<ref name="AJ3" />}}
The '''Kira Run''' was a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] that was located in [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. It connected the [[Harrin Trade Corridor]] at the [[Lazerian system/Legends|Lazerian system]] with the [[Enarc Run/Legends|Enarc Run]] located at the [[Ropagi system/Legends|Ropagi system]].

==Astrography==
The Kira Run connected the [[Lazerian system/Legends|Lazerian system]] and the [[Ropagi system/Legends|Ropagi system]], thus building a link between the [[Harrin Trade Corridor]] and the [[Enarc Run/Legends|Enarc Run]] respectively. The only stopover on the route was the dead Kira system, which consisted of a massive [[asteroid field]] and the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kira IV]]. These asteroids presented a danger to anyone who would travel the route.<ref name="TSK" />

==History==
The Enarc Run and the Harrin Trade Corridor had been well-established hyperlanes for a long time and were thriving with trade. Attempts to connect these two profitable routes, however, were difficult due to the lack of navigation points and numerous deep space hazards between them. This changed when [[Scout/Legends|explorers]] found a reference to the long destroyed and forgotten planet of [[Kira Prime]]. Using the [[Kira system/Legends|Kira system's]] existing coordinates as a reference, the [[Haik Expedition]] started out from the Ropagi system.<ref name="TSK" /> The route was formally established on 4:11 in [[70 BBY/Legends|70 BBY]].<ref name="HNN" />

The route, however remained dangerous because the asteroid field of the Kira system was largely unstable. For the first decades of its existence, travel on the route was limited to a few shuttle operations. The Run was profitable for those who made it, but ever so often, people died in hyperspace accidents. Around [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] larger trading corporations established standard runs along the route<ref name="AJ3" /> and it soon became an indispensable part of [[Galactic economy#trade|galactic trade]]. [[Lazerian (star)|Lazerian]] and [[Ropagi/Legends|Ropagi]] - the end points of the Kira Run - experienced an economic boost and became known as the "Twin Stars of Kira".<ref name="TSK" />

==Locations==
===Lazerian IV===
{{Main|Lazerian IV}}
'''Lazerian IV''' was a terrestrial world located on the Harrin Trade Corridor. It was home to a large Human population, ruled by a [[Monarchy/Legends|monarchy]] and origin of the [[Empeth Crystal]]s. The Jedi once had an outpost on the planet. Unbeknownst to the Human population, the planet also was home to [[Akwin]], a species that lived in the oceans of the world. Both species took great care not to harm the environment of the world.<ref name="TSK" />

===Kira system===
{{Main|Kira system/Legends}}
A dead system filled with [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] and one world, the '''Kira system''' was the middle point of the Kira Run. Its name was used to name the Kira Run as well as the [[Kira sector/Legends|Kira sector]]. Originally the system contained one habitable world, but it was destroyed not long after its discovery - together with two other worlds of the system. After its re-discovery by the Haik Expedition, the Kira system now serves as an stop-over point for all traveling the Kira Run.<ref name="TSK" />

===Ropagi II===
{{Main|Ropagi II}}
The world of '''Ropagi II''' was home to the [[near-Human]] [[Ropagu]] and the [[Kalduu]], who lived together in a symbiotic relationship. The Ropagu were physically frail and tended to solve problem through philosophy. To protect their world, they hired [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] and off-worlders were limited to only one city. This made Ropagi II the largest mercenary market on the Enarc Run.<ref name="TSK" />

==Travel Times==
The Kira Run was a short and well-mapped route. With a Class-1 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], the travel from the [[Lazerian system/Legends|Lazerian system]] to the [[Ropagi/Legends|Ropagi]] system did not last longer than two hours.<ref name="TSK" />
